criteriaResults.criterion: Vite project initialized with React TypeScript template
criteriaResults.evidence: vite.config.ts, package.json, index.html, and src/main.tsx all properly configured

criteriaResults.criterion: TypeScript strict mode enabled in tsconfig.json with no implicit any
criteriaResults.evidence: tsconfig.json has both 'strict: true' and 'noImplicitAny: true'

criteriaResults.criterion: Tailwind CSS installed and configured with dark mode class strategy

criteriaResults.evidence: postcss.config.js exports config with tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins

criteriaResults.criterion: index.css imports Tailwind base, components, and utilities
React Router v6 installed and basic BrowserRouter configured in App.tsx
criteriaResults.evidence: react-router-dom v6.21.0 installed, App.tsx implements BrowserRouter with 5 routes

criteriaResults.criterion: Recharts library installed for data visualization
Playwright installed for E2E testing with basic config
npm run dev starts development server without errors
criteriaResults.evidence: Vite dev server started successfully on http://localhost:5173 in 104ms

criteriaResults.criterion: npm run build succeeds without errors
criteriaResults.evidence: TypeScript compilation and Vite build completed successfully in 568ms, 39 modules transformed
All required folders exist: src/types, src/data, src/context, src/hooks, src/components, src/pages

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty placeholder files created for main architectural pieces
criteriaResults.evidence: Placeholder and implementation files created in all folders: types/index.ts, data/mockData.ts, plus context, hooks, components, and pages
Playwright smoke tests: 3 passed (2.5s) - app loads, navigation works, no console errors

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Project scaffolding complete with Vite, React 18, TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS (dark mode class strategy), React Router v6, Lucide icons, Recharts, and Playwright E2E testing. Build pipeline functional (dev server starts, production build succeeds). Smoke tests confirm app loads without errors. Implementation exceeds minimum requirements with additional context providers, custom hooks, and UI components already in place.
